DROP TABLE [EDW].[FACT_MILESTONE_CHANGE]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[FACT_MILESTONE_CHANGE]
( 
	[MilestoneChangeID] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[MilestoneDateTypeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[JobID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[EmployeeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[EstimatedDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[ActualDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[ActualTime] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[OldActualDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[OldActualTime] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[OldestDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[DateChanged] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[LP_MilestoneChangeID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_MilestoneDateTypeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LP_JobID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_EmployeeID] [int]  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](100) NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime2](7)  NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [MilestoneChangeID] ),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
